faqs_list.q: How quickly do you respond to RFQs?
faqs_list.a: We respond to all RFQ submissions within 4–24 business hours with a formal quotation.

faqs_list.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqs_list.a: MOQ varies by product. Many items have no minimum. Contact us for specific product requirements.

faqs_list.q: Do you manage international pharmaceutical logistics?
faqs_list.a: Yes. We operate across 50+ countries, managing all customs protocols and complex freight arrangements.
All products in our catalog are sourced exclusively from WHO-GMP certified manufacturers.

home.about_title: The Essential Bridge in Healthcare Supply Chains
home.about_p1: PharmaLink Pro operates at the intersection of medical necessity and logistical precision. As a licensed global wholesaler, we remove the complexities of international pharmaceutical procurement.
home.mission_text: To make pharmaceutical procurement transparent, efficient, and accessible for every healthcare institution worldwide.
home.vision_text: A world where no patient goes without medicine due to supply chain failures or procurement inefficiencies.
home.contact_subtitle: Our procurement experts are ready to assist with bulk orders, regular supplies, or specialized medical equipment imports.
home.categories_subtitle: Streamlined procurement for every medical department.

about.title: The Essential Bridge in Healthcare Supply Chains
about.subtitle: Since 2009, PharmaLink has connected medical institutions worldwide with precision-sourced pharmaceuticals, surgical supplies, and laboratory equipment.
about.mission_vision_p1: PharmaLink Pro operates at the intersection of medical necessity and logistical precision. As a licensed global wholesaler, we remove the complexities of international pharmaceutical procurement.
about.mission_vision_p2: Our commitment to Regulatory Compliance ensures that every SKU in our catalog meets rigorous international standards, including WHO, FDA, and EMA guidelines. We prioritize clinical integrity from origin to delivery.
about.values_subtitle: The principles that guide every decision we make.
about.timeline_subtitle: Key milestones in our journey to becoming a global pharmaceutical leader.
about.team_subtitle: The people behind PharmaLink's global operations.
about.cert_subtitle: Every product we distribute is backed by internationally recognized certifications and rigorous quality controls.
about.partner_subtitle: Join thousands of healthcare institutions that trust PharmaLink for their pharmaceutical procurement needs.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Strict adherence to international pharmaceutical standards and safety protocols.

cold_chain.title: Cold Chain Integrity
cold_chain.desc: Advanced temperature-controlled logistics for sensitive medical products.

partnerships.title: Global Partnerships
partnerships.desc: Strong relationships with leading manufacturers to ensure reliable supply.

efficiency.title: Operational Efficiency
efficiency.desc: Streamlined procurement processes and rapid global distribution.

ceo.bio: Leading PharmaLink with 20+ years of healthcare logistics experience.

regulatory.name: Dr. Amara Okoro
regulatory.bio: Ensuring all imports meet international farmacopeia standards.

qa.name: James Chen
qa.bio: Overseeing rigorous inspection protocols for all medical supplies.

logistics.name: Sarah Williams
logistics.bio: Expert in global cold chain and pharmaceutical supply movements.

2009.title: Founded in Addis Ababa
2009.desc: PharmaLink was established with a focus on local pharmaceutical gaps.

2012.title: Regional Expansion
2012.desc: Started cross-border operations within East African healthcare markets.

2015.title: Import License Milestone
2015.desc: Obtained major international import permits for specialty medications.

2018.title: Digital Transformation
2018.desc: Launched the industry-leading RFQ portal for medical institutions.

2021.title: Global Cold Chain Center
2021.desc: Opened our state-of-the-art temperature-controlled logistics hub.

2024.title: Next Gen Healthcare
2024.desc: Expanding into personalized medicine and advanced surgical robotics.

services_page.title: End-to-End Pharmaceutical Supply Services
services_page.subtitle: From wholesale supply and international import to cold chain logistics and regulatory support — we cover every step of the pharmaceutical procurement journey.
services_page.list_title: Everything You Need in One Partner
services_page.cta_subtitle: Submit your first RFQ today and receive a competitive quotation from our procurement specialists within 24 hours.

wholesale.title: Pharmaceutical Wholesale Supply
wholesale.desc: We supply bulk pharmaceutical products directly to pharmacies, hospitals, clinics, and distributors at competitive wholesale prices.

import.title: International Import & Export
import.desc: Licensed pharmaceutical importer with global sourcing capabilities. We handle all regulatory documentation, customs clearance, and international freight.

cold_chain.title: Cold Chain Logistics
cold_chain.desc: Specialized temperature-controlled storage and distribution for biologics, vaccines, and temperature-sensitive pharmaceuticals. IoT-monitored throughout the entire supply chain.

rfq.title: RFQ & Quotation Management
rfq.desc: Our digital RFQ platform allows healthcare institutions to submit structured quotation requests for multiple products simultaneously. Receive formal quotations within 4–24 hours.

regulatory.title: Regulatory & Compliance Support
regulatory.desc: Our regulatory affairs team assists clients with product registration, import permits, and compliance documentation for all major international markets.

support.title: After-Sales & Technical Support
support.desc: Dedicated customer support team available for order tracking, product queries, documentation requests, and post-delivery support. Available Monday–Friday, 9am–6pm GMT.

process_steps.title: Submit RFQ
process_steps.desc: Use our digital RFQ wizard to specify products, quantities, and delivery requirements.

process_steps.title: Quotation Review
process_steps.desc: Our team reviews your request and prepares a competitive formal quotation within 4–24 hours.

process_steps.title: Order Confirmation
process_steps.desc: Approve the quotation and confirm your order. We handle all procurement and logistics.

process_steps.title: Delivery & Documentation
process_steps.desc: Receive your order with full regulatory documentation, CoA, and delivery confirmation.

categories_page.title: Specialized Categories for Every Medical Department
categories_page.subtitle: From prescription medicines to laboratory equipment — streamlined procurement for pharmacies, hospitals, clinics, and distributors worldwide.
categories_page.process_title: How to Order from Any Category
categories_page.custom_subtitle: Our procurement specialists can source any pharmaceutical product globally. Submit a custom RFQ and we'll find it for you.
